assertion_results.text: The third JQL query uses labels IN (ai-cve-triaged) AND status NOT IN (Closed, Verified, ON_QA) to find triaged CVEs still in a pre-QA state
assertion_results.evidence: ready-for-qa.md line 6 shows the query: 'project = TC AND issuetype = 10024 AND labels IN (ai-cve-triaged) AND status NOT IN (Closed, Verified, 'ON_QA') ORDER BY created DESC'. This matches the required labels IN (ai-cve-triaged) AND status NOT IN (Closed, Verified, ON_QA) clauses, and the file explicitly states it 'returns triaged Vulnerability issues that are not yet in a terminal or QA status'.

assertion_results.text: For each query 3 result, the skill checks issuelinks for linked Tasks with link type Depend and fetches each linked Task's status
assertion_results.evidence: ready-for-qa.md evaluates all 3 candidates from the query: TC-9020 shows 'Linked remediation Tasks (Depend): TC-9021 (Task) — Done, TC-9022 (Task) — Closed'; TC-9023 shows 'Linked remediation Tasks (Depend): TC-9024 (Task) — Done, TC-9025 (Task) — In Progress'; TC-9026 shows 'Linked remediation Tasks (Depend): (none)'. Each candidate explicitly references link type 'Depend' and individual task statuses.

assertion_results.text: TC-9020 is included in Ready for QA because ALL linked remediation Tasks are completed (TC-9021 Done, TC-9022 Closed)
assertion_results.evidence: ready-for-qa.md states for TC-9020: 'Assessment: ALL linked remediation Tasks are in a completed status (Done or Closed). Result: QUALIFIED — Ready for QA'. The linked tasks are listed as TC-9021 (Done) and TC-9022 (Closed). discovery-listing.md also includes TC-9020 in the 'Ready for QA (1 issue)' section with 'Remediation Tasks: TC-9021 (Done), TC-9022 (Closed)'.

assertion_results.text: TC-9023 is excluded from Ready for QA because TC-9025 is still In Progress — remediation is not complete
assertion_results.evidence: ready-for-qa.md states for TC-9023: 'Result: EXCLUDED — Remediation in progress. Reason: TC-9025 remains open (In Progress). The CVE cannot move to QA until all remediation tasks are completed.' TC-9023 does not appear in the Ready for QA section of discovery-listing.md.

assertion_results.text: TC-9026 is excluded from Ready for QA because it has no linked Tasks with type Depend — no remediation to verify
assertion_results.evidence: ready-for-qa.md states for TC-9026: 'Linked remediation Tasks (Depend): (none). Assessment: No linked Tasks with link type "Depend" exist on this issue. Result: EXCLUDED — No remediation tasks to verify.' TC-9026 does not appear in the Ready for QA section of discovery-listing.md.

assertion_results.text: The Ready for QA section includes a Remediation Tasks column showing the linked tasks and their statuses
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-listing.md lines 41-43 show a table with columns 'Issue | Status | CVE | Summary | Created | Remediation Tasks' where TC-9020 row includes 'TC-9021 (Done), TC-9022 (Closed)' in the Remediation Tasks column. ready-for-qa.md summary table (lines 52-56) also shows a 'Linked Tasks' column with task IDs and statuses.

assertion_results.text: For each Ready for QA issue, the output suggests transitioning to ON_QA
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-listing.md line 45: 'TC-9020: All linked remediation tasks are complete. Consider transitioning to ON_QA.' ready-for-qa.md line 22: 'Recommendation: Consider transitioning TC-9020 to ON_QA. All remediation work has been completed.' TC-9020 is the only Ready for QA issue, and both files suggest ON_QA transition for it.
